name: Kidwelly Castle, Quay & Salt Marsh
highlights: One of Wales's most complete Norman castles plus a quiet tidal estuary full of waders.
points_of_interest: Kidwelly Castle (Cadw, 1106); Kidwelly Industrial Museum; quay ruins
picnic_spots: Castle lawn (Cadw members only) or quay
food_drink_nearby: The Boot & Shoe Kidwelly; Penny Chandler Ferryside (nearby)
hazards_notes: Salt marsh floods at spring tides; castle entry fee
